'''âm-v-w-k''' ('''kamavwekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photostabilize|photostabilize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-v-w-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photostabilize|photostabilize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-v-w-k
|-
! Lemma
| kamavwekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimavwekoko|thimavwekoko]] || [[word:jimavwekoko|jimavwekoko]] || [[word:shimavwekoko|shimavwekoko]] || [[word:kimavwekoko|kimavwekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumavwekoko|thuthumavwekoko]] || [[word:jujumavwekoko|jujumavwekoko]] || [[word:shushumavwekoko|shushumavwekoko]] || [[word:kukumavwekoko|kukumavwekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumavwekoko|thumavwekoko]] || [[word:jumavwekoko|jumavwekoko]] || [[word:shumavwekoko|shumavwekoko]] || [[word:kumavwekoko|kumavwekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumavwekoko|thumavwekoko]] || [[word:jumavwekoko|jumavwekoko]] || [[word:shumavwekoko|shumavwekoko]] || [[word:kumavwekoko|kumavwekoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomavwekoko|thothomavwekoko]] || [[word:jojomavwekoko|jojomavwekoko]] || [[word:shoshomavwekoko|shoshomavwekoko]] || [[word:kokomavwekoko|kokomavwekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomavwekoko|thomavwekoko]] || [[word:jomavwekoko|jomavwekoko]] || [[word:shomavwekoko|shomavwekoko]] || [[word:komavwekoko|komavwekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomavwekoko|thomavwekoko]] || [[word:jomavwekoko|jomavwekoko]] || [[word:shomavwekoko|shomavwekoko]] || [[word:komavwekoko|komavwekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmavwekoko|thĂŠmavwekoko]] || [[word:jĂŠmavwekoko|jĂŠmavwekoko]] || [[word:shĂŠmavwekoko|shĂŠmavwekoko]] || [[word:kĂŠmavwekoko|kĂŠmavwekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamavwekoko|thathamavwekoko]] || [[word:jajamavwekoko|jajamavwekoko]] || [[word:shashamavwekoko|shashamavwekoko]] || [[word:kakamavwekoko|kakamavwekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamavwekoko|thamavwekoko]] || [[word:jamavwekoko|jamavwekoko]] || [[word:shamavwekoko|shamavwekoko]] || [[word:kamavwekoko|kamavwekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamavwekoko|thamavwekoko]] || [[word:jamavwekoko|jamavwekoko]] || [[word:shamavwekoko|shamavwekoko]] || [[word:kamavwekoko|kamavwekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
